text:
Research the following token security/spam scanning APIs and return their endpoints, authentication methods, what data they return, and any free tier limits:

1. GoPlus Security API (https://gopluslabs.io) - token security endpoint
2. 0x API token security/spam filtering
3. Honeypot.is API
4. De.Fi Shield API
5. Moralis token spam detection (already have API key)
6. Alchemy token spam detection

For each, find:
- The exact API endpoint URL
- Whether it requires an API key
- What it returns (spam score, honeypot detection, etc.)
- Rate limits on free tier
- Whether it supports EVM chains like Base, Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum

Focus on APIs that work without requiring a paid API key or that have a generous free tier. Return concrete endpoint examples.
